classification.rationale: Rule-based: learning intent detected in 'Introduction'. Products: general. Funnel: awareness.

cta_health_issues: Too many CTAs (5). Research shows effectiveness drops after 3-4. Consider removing the weakest ones.
CTAs are only at the top. Move at least one to mid-article or conclusion where readers are most engaged.
No CTA at the end of the article. Readers who finish are your highest-intent audience.
CTA 'Try it for free' targets decision readers but article is awareness-stage content.
